transcript:
Hi. Uh, I go by Proph3t. Um, and yeah, I guess when most people here have talked about internet capital markets, uh, they talk about like on-chain stocks or like, yeah, some fancy infrastructure that's going to shave your bips down on your spreads down from like five bips to two bips. Uh, we have a different way of seeing things. Um, I think historically like what's brought people on-chain, if you look historically is like, yeah, ICOs, uh, NFTs, memecoins. These are all like crypto-native assets that you can't already trade in a brokerage account. Um, and I think it's it's like fairly reasonable to assume that actually crypto-native assets or like assets that we create as like teams on in crypto will be the way that, um, the internet capital markets, uh, work. And and I'm going to talk about why that's the case and why if you're a founder, uh, you should consider tapping internet capital markets to raise for your crypto business.

And and yeah, so the core point is like this is uh Hyperliquid's perp volume over time chart. Uh, and the question is can you see when they launched their coin just by looking at this chart? Uh, and yeah, you kind of can. It's like right in that area before they before they go up, uh, around October November. Um, a big reason being that all these people that now own Hype have an incentive to like, um, to talk about, uh, their bags. Like to to shill Hyperliquid as a as a product, um, and, uh, to use it. And so, uh, this is uh Avici's, uh spending volume over time chart. Uh, Avici is a crypto credit card product or like neobank that uh launched on on MetaDAO. Um, and the question is can you see when they launched their ownership coin? Um, and again, you can see it very clearly. It's like right before their spending volume hockey sticks up and their uh volume per day is now like people using the credit card per day is up more than 10x since they launched.

Um, and so like these are reasons why you if you're building a crypto-native business you should launch a coin, right like you should raise from the from your users, the people who are going to uh shill you on Crypto Twitter as opposed to raising from uh investors, like private investors. Uh, but they don't explain why you should launch an ownership coin. I think the the key point there is uh people are tired of getting rugged in crypto. This has been a huge huge problem. Um, both the problem of rugs of like yeah this is a successful business, uh, but actually none of these cash flows go back to me as a token holder. Like I'm not even talking about buybacks, I'm talking about blatant rugs like uh businesses being built, uh, like Unibot built Unibot on Solana, made $200 million in fees, that none of that is going to token holders. Unibot is like bled to zero. Um, it's just being held by the team forever. And then also the problem of rugs of like people of teams just like taking the money um and running away which has been like a pretty rampant problem in crypto.

And yeah, so MetaDAO, which is what I work on, is the home of what we call ownership coins. Uh, so that has two components. One of them is like a a governance or a market oversight component which is kind of scary to people like people have been scarred by by DAOs before. But it's not uh it's not crazy. It's basically like um probably two to four times a year you're you're raising these proposals of like uh hey I need to mint new tokens uh for example and to maybe do like an investment round uh like an OTC to to raise more money for the business. Uh, and instead of voting people trade in those and yeah I only have five minutes so I can't get into exactly how that works but you can read up on it. Uh and so that's the market oversight component. And then we also have this legal structuring component which is um what prevents rugs of like uh the business is successful and it never goes back to the token holders. So actually we have these legal entities where you as a founder raising on this system, you assign your IP to that entity. That entity uh points to the on-chain uh market system as like uh as arbiting um where that IP can move and so yeah you essentially just like can't walk away with the business. If if if you get acquired you can't just like take all the money um which has been a recent thing lately.

And so yeah here are some of the projects that have raised on MetaDAO. Uh it's all crypto-native projects so like Omnipair for example is building a special kind of borrow lend, Solomon is building like Ethena for Solana, Avici yeah crypto neobank, Umbra is a privacy protocol, uh Paystream borrow lend, Loyal and ZKLSOL are also privacy protocols. Um and this is what that looks like. So yeah Umbra for example wanted to raise uh 750k, ended up raising $3 million through MetaDAO. And that could be you next. Uh and if you want that to be you next, message me on Telegram, send me a short blurb of what you're working on. Um and if we're interested I will follow up with you. And please like if you're a genuine team building something interesting I really really want to talk to you. Um so yeah that's uh that's my pitch. Thanks.

# MetaMask Announces Free Solana ID Minting for Users Before Breakpoint 2025
MetaMask is offering free Solana ID minting until December 22, unlocking exclusive Solana ecosystem perks for users.
![Kelvin Munene](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d4ea74978aea7ee299447dc24a59aa1dac1fdc2a31a46fbf19da2cdce3d322bd?s=32&r=g)By[Kelvin Munene](https://coincentral.com/author/kelvin/)December 8, 2025**4 Mins Read
![](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/08/metamask-1.png "MetaMask Announces Free Solana ID Minting for Users Before Breakpoint 2025")
## TLDR
* MetaMask users can mint a Solana ID for free until December 22, 2025.
* The initiative provides users access to perks like staking boosts and rewards.
* Solana partners like Orca and Sanctum offer exclusive benefits for Solana ID holders.
* The program aims to increase wallet adoption and engagement in Solana apps.
MetaMaskhas announced a new initiative that offers users the chance to mint a free Solana ID. This special promotion is available until December 22, 2025. The move is part of a broader partnership between MetaMask and Solana Identity, ahead of Solana’s annual developer conference, Breakpoint 2025. This initiative is designed to encourage users to engage more with Solana’s ecosystem and to provide them with exclusive benefits.
**Mint a Solana ID to Unlock Exclusive Ecosystem Perks**
By minting a Solana ID using MetaMask,[users](https://x.com/MetaMask/status/1998060127950409942?s=20)can unlock various perks across the Solana blockchain ecosystem. These include rewards like staking boosts, exclusive swaps, and access to discounts. Additionally, users will be eligible to participate in raffles and earn rewards from several key partners within the Solana network. Notable Solana-based platforms involved in the program include Orca, SNS, Sanctum, Cudis, and Play Solana.
MetaMask users will not only gain access to these platform-specific rewards but will also be able to explore further opportunities within the Solana ecosystem. These perks are meant to deepen user engagement and increase wallet adoption among MetaMask users who are interacting with Solana applications.
**How the Solana ID Minting Works**
Minting a Solana ID via MetaMask is straightforward. Users simply need to connect their[MetaMask](https://coincentral.com/metamask-introduces-musd-to-simplify-crypto-payments-and-defi-access/)wallet to the Solana Identity platform and follow the steps to mint their Solana ID. The process is free, and users will retain the ID throughout their interactions with Solana-based services. Once minted, the Solana ID will be linked to the user’s MetaMask wallet, allowing them to access the various ecosystem benefits.
The initiative aims to bring together the strengths of MetaMask’s popular walle

Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates

## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents
](#)
[
Contents
](#)
[
](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

tags.impact_reason: MetaDAO focuses on alternative fundraising methods for crypto projects, which, while potentially impactful, is not immediately ecosystem-shifting.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose the semantic anchor of a legal contract being physically and permanently fused with a crystalline blockchain ledger. This visually represents the core concept of 'Legally-Bound Ownership Coins' from the headline. It's about creating an unbreakable, transparent bond between intellectual property and on-chain assets, which directly addresses the story's theme of 'killing the rug pull'. For the homepage text, I integrated 'OWNERSHIP' as a high-impact word. It is diegetically heat-stamped onto the fused material, representing the permanent and foundational nature of this new standard.
visual_idea.description: A super-macro, detailed shot focusing on the fusion point. We see the organic fibers of the parchment becoming a seamless part of the glowing, blue, crystalline data structure. Faint, elegant script from the legal contract is now illuminated from within, perfectly integrated and legible amidst the geometric patterns of the blockchain code. The texture is a mesmerizing blend of the ancient and the futuristic, conveying a sense of unbreakable permanence.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A super-macro, detailed shot focusing on the fusion point, presented in a perfect 1:1 square aspect ratio with symmetrical, central focus, filling the frame with intricate texture. We see the organic fibers of ancient parchment seamlessly merging into a vibrant, glowing, blue, crystalline data structure. Faint, elegant script from a legal contract is illuminated from within the glowing blue facets, perfectly integrated and legible amidst the sharp, geometric patterns of the blockchain code. The entire texture is a mesmerizing blend of the ancient and the futuristic, conveying an overwhelming sense of unbreakable permanence, rendered with high-contrast chiaroscuro lighting and prominent volumetric blue light. Polished metallic surfaces subtly reflect the blue glow, enhancing the brutalist permanence, evoking a cool blue halo and deep shadows. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, volumetric lighting, high-contrast, chiaroscuro.

editorial.headline: MetaDAO Kills the 'Rug' with Legally-Bound Ownership Coins
editorial.standfirst: A new 'Ownership Coin' standard binds intellectual property to on-chain markets, solving the value accrual crisis for crypto equities. The framework introduces institutional-grade protections to prevent founder exit scams while weaponizing users as evangelists.
key_takeaways: **Avici** daily volume surged **10x** immediately post-launch, validating the 'owner-evangelist' thesis.
Privacy protocol **Umbra** successfully raised **$3 million** via **MetaDAO**, significantly exceeding its initial $750k target.
New legal structures assign project IP to the DAO, preventing founders from siphoning cash flows or abandoning the token.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The era of the 'valueless governance token' may be ending. Speaking at Breakpoint, **MetaDAO** founder **Proph3t** dismantled the prevailing venture model in crypto, citing the disconnect between protocol success and token value. He pointed to **Unibot** as a cautionary tale: a Solana-based project that generated $200 million in fees, none of which accrued to token holders, before the project slowly bled out. To solve this, **MetaDAO** is pivoting the market toward 'Ownership Coins'—assets that combine market-based oversight with legally binding intellectual property (IP) assignment.

This new standard introduces a dual-layer protection mechanism designed to make 'rugs' structurally impossible. The first layer is **Futarchy**, a governance model where decisions—such as minting new tokens for an OTC round—are traded rather than voted upon, ensuring markets price in the impact of dilution immediately. The second, and perhaps more significant for institutional investors, is the legal wrapper. Founders raising on **MetaDAO** must assign their IP to a DAO-controlled entity. If a team attempts to walk away with the treasury or sell the company privately, the on-chain market retains the legal rights to the software and brand.

The thesis is already generating alpha in live markets. **Proph3t** highlighted **Avici**, a crypto-native neobank, as a prime case study. Following the launch of its Ownership Coin, **Avici** saw its daily spending volume 'hockey stick,' growing more than **10x**. The data suggests that when users hold a legally enforceable stake in a protocol, they transition from passive users to aggressive evangelists, mirroring the volume spikes seen in **Hyperliquid** prior to its ascent. 

The pipeline for this new asset class is rapidly expanding. Beyond **Avici**, privacy protocol **Umbra** sought $750k but closed a **$3 million** round due to overwhelming demand. Upcoming launches include **Solomon** (described as '**Ethena** for Solana'), **Paystream**, and **Loyal**. For investors, **MetaDAO** is effectively attempting to industrialize the 'cult' energy of memecoins, wrapping it in the legal and financial safeguards required for serious capital allocation.
